product_overview: Public-facing hotel booking website and booking APIs backed by a Frappe app. Provides room type browsing, availability checks, booking creation, Razorpay payment order generation, and webhook-based payment confirmation.
core_goals: Expose reliable room type and availability APIs for a responsive booking UX
Allow guests to create bookings and receive a Razorpay payment order
Verify payments via Razorpay webhook and update booking status (Confirmed) automatically
Provide clear error responses for availability, booking creation, and payment flows

features.name: Room Types & Availability
features.description: Browse available room types and check date-range availability before booking.
user_flows: POST /api/booking/availability with body {room_type, check_in, check_out} -> Receive 200 with available_count (number > 0)
POST /api/booking/availability with body {room_type, check_in, check_out} -> Receive 200 with available_count = 0

features.name: Booking Creation & Payment Order
features.description: Create a booking record (guest info + dates + room type) and request a Razorpay payment order for the booking total.
user_flows: POST /api/booking/create with body {guest_name, email, room_type, check_in, check_out} -> Receive 200 with {booking_id, total_amount}
POST /api/booking/payment with body {booking_id} -> Receive 200 with {order_id, key, amount}
POST /api/booking/create with invalid or missing fields -> Receive 400 with validation error

POST /api/booking/create with body {guest_name, email, room_type, check_in, check_out} -> Receive 200 with {booking_id, total_amount} -> POST /api/booking/payment with body {booking_id} -> Receive 500 with error

features.name: Razorpay Webhook Payment Verification
features.description: Receive Razorpay webhook events to verify payment signatures, update booking status, and trigger confirmation email automation.
user_flows: POST /api/method/hotel_booking.api.payment.razorpay_webhook with Razorpay webhook payload and signature header -> Receive 200 OK

POST /api/method/hotel_booking.api.payment.razorpay_webhook with Razorpay webhook payload and signature header -> Receive 200 OK -> GET /api/booking/{booking_id} -> Receive 200 with booking status = 'Confirmed'
POST /api/method/hotel_booking.api.payment.razorpay_webhook with payload and invalid signature header -> Receive 400 with signature verification failed

features.name: Hotel Booking
features.description: Booking form with room type selection, availability check, guest details, and Razorpay payment
